requirement_topic.zh: OPWP / OETC / Nama 并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: OPWP / OETC / Nama 併網審查

summary.en: Utility-scale or network-connected PV projects in Oman require project-specific grid review through the applicable procurement, transmission, or distribution route. OPWP procurement documents, OETC transmission requirements, and Nama distribution-company connection requirements can require inverter capability evidence for active and reactive power control, voltage and frequency ride-through, protection coordination, power quality, telemetry, commissioning tests, and site-specific settings.
summary.zh: 阿曼公用事业级或电网接入光伏项目需要通过适用的采购、输电或配电路径进行项目特定并网审查。OPWP 采购文件、OETC 输电要求和 Nama 配电公司接入要求可能要求逆变器提供有功/无功控制、电压和频率穿越、保护配合、电能质量、遥测、调试测试和现场特定参数证据。
summary.zht: 阿曼公用事業級或電網接入光伏專案需要通過適用的採購、輸電或配電路徑進行專案特定併網審查。OPWP 採購文件、OETC 輸電要求和 Nama 配電公司接入要求可能要求逆變器提供有功／無功控制、電壓和頻率穿越、保護配合、電能品質、遙測、調試測試和現場特定參數證據。

standards_or_laws: OPWP project procurement and power-purchase requirements where applicable
Oman Electricity Transmission Company grid-code and connection requirements where applicable
Project-specific protection, power-quality, telemetry, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China grid files commonly cite GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, GB/T 37408-2019 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, NB/T 32004-2018, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid acceptance records. These records can support engineering review but do not authorize connection to the Oman grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网文件通常引用 GB/T 19964-2024 光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、GB/T 37408-2019 光伏并网逆变器技术要求、NB/T 32004-2018，以及国家电网或南方电网验收记录。这些记录可支持工程审查，但不能授权接入阿曼电网。
summary.zht: 中國併網文件通常引用 GB/T 19964-2024 光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、GB/T 37408-2019 光伏併網逆變器技術要求、NB/T 32004-2018，以及國家電網或南方電網驗收記錄。這些記錄可支持工程審查，但不能授權接入阿曼電網。

gap.en: Separate product capability from project grid approval. The Oman file should include a grid-code matrix, firmware setting sheet, protection study inputs, reactive-power and power-quality evidence, ride-through data where requested, telemetry interface details, commissioning procedure, and final site settings.
gap.zh: 应区分产品能力和项目并网批准。阿曼资料包应包括并网规范矩阵、固件参数表、保护研究输入、无功和电能质量证据、被要求时的穿越数据、遥测接口详情、调试程序和最终现场参数。
gap.zht: 應區分產品能力和專案併網批准。阿曼資料包應包括併網規範矩陣、韌體參數表、保護研究輸入、無功和電能品質證據、被要求時的穿越資料、遙測介面詳情、調試程序和最終現場參數。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project requires OPWP, OETC, Nama, distribution-company, procurer, lender, insurer, or project-owner grid acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid reports are supporting technical evidence only and do not replace Oman project grid approval

source.publisher: Oman Power and Water Procurement Company (OPWP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman grid acceptance is project-specific. China GB/T grid reports should be translated into the OPWP / OETC / Nama study package and final settings file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼并网接受具有项目特定性。中国 GB/T 并网报告应转化为 OPWP / OETC / Nama 研究资料包和最终参数文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼併網接受具有專案特定性。中國 GB/T 併網報告應轉化為 OPWP / OETC / Nama 研究資料包和最終參數文件。
